creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Rainer Hurling from comment #3)
Thanks for the quick feedback :D


One more suggestion:

If you want to show OPTIONS in the sorted order 'RSYNC GIT HG DARCS' as in your OPTIONS_DEFINE line, one have to add NO_OPTIONS_SORT=yes.

Should I do this additionally?  [no more approval needed ;) ]
